final:
// // This module implements an asynchronous D flip-flop with synchronous reset.
module dff_4bit(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q);
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an asynchronous D flip-flop with synchronous reset.
